conservative.name: Coordinated Strike
conservative.requirements: Leadership trained, you and a coordinating ally both equipped with melee weapons and both engaged with the target

success.description: You hit the target using your weapon's damage rating but the coordinating ally's Strength to determine damage

boon.description: The coordinating ally may immediately perform a free manoeuvre

bane.description: You and the coordinating ally each suffer 1 fatigue

reckless.name: Coordinated Strike
reckless.requirements: Leadership trained, you and a coordinating ally both equipped with melee weapons and both engaged with the target

success.description: You hit using your own Strength but the coordinating ally's weapon damage and critical ratings to determine damage
As above, and with enough boons, you can activate the critical ratings of both weapons

boon.description: Add the coordinating ally's Strength to the damage inflicted

bane.description: You and all allies in this engagement suffer 1 fatigue
